title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — service.beta.kubernetes.io/aws-load-balancer-additional-resource-tags (beta)
text:
Example:
service.beta.kubernetes.io/aws-load-balancer-additional-resource-tags: "Environment=demo,Project=example"
Used on: Service
The cloud controller manager integration with AWS elastic load balancing configures
tags (an AWS concept) for a load balancer based on the comma-separated key/value
pairs in the value of this annotation.
